title: stepsize
text: stepsize Set the number of entries are selected in one step of a stepped hitlist. USYS$LDP_PARAMS = stepsize: Number Arguments Number —number of entries in step; if not specified, defaults to 10 . Example: stepsize USYS$LDP_PARAMS = stepsize:25 Copy Related Links Stepped Hitlists Uniface uses the Select request to create a partially built hitlist called a stepped hitlist. This mechanism ensures that a limited number of occurrences are fetched from the database, even though a large number of occurrences match the retrieve profile entered by the user.
